criterion_description: Frozen calibrated probability models exist for each candidate strategy and are evaluated out of sample.
acceptance_threshold: model artifact/version present; Brier score and calibration curve computed out of sample

criterion_description: Directional and probabilistic metrics beat no-skill, majority-direction and Brier baselines.
acceptance_threshold: positive accuracy excess versus no-skill and majority baselines plus positive Brier skill

criterion_description: Predeclared holdout cells beat local-majority baselines without threshold reuse.
Untouched-test cells pass after development is frozen.
acceptance_threshold: all untouched-test cells beat local-majority baselines

criterion_description: Feature importance or attribution is stable across registered seeds/folds.
acceptance_threshold: stable feature set and bounded importance volatility across seeds

criterion_description: Joined predictive promotion-falsification checklist clears all blockers.
acceptance_threshold: predictive_promotion_candidate is true and falsification status is clear
